description: Use the test_driven optimizer to improve the complaint-generator graph analysis phase. Target files: complaint_phases/dependency_graph.py. Phase goal: Improve knowledge-graph and dependency-graph population so denoising and legal reasoning operate on structured facts instead of raw narrative alone. Recommended actions: Improve denoiser gap selection and answer processing so each turn closes a concrete knowledge-graph gap instead of only restating the narrative.; Make answer processing update entities, relationships, and satisfied requirements deterministically when the complainant supplies the missing field.; Promote exact dates, staff names/titles, hearing-request timing, response dates, and causation sequencing into graph updates before broadening the next question set.. Weak complaint types to generalize for: housing_discrimination, hacc_research_engine. Weak evidence modalities to improve: policy_document, file_evidence. Focus only on complaint_phases/intake_case_file.py. Target symbols: build_timeline_consistency_summary.
diff_content:
--- a/complaint_phases/intake_case_file.py
+++ b/complaint_phases/intake_case_file.py
@@ -1231,6 +1231,11 @@
     if non_day_precision_fact_ids:
         warnings.append("Some anchored facts are only month/year precision and may still need day-level dates.")
 
+    if orphan_anchor_count:
+
+        warnings.append("Some timeline anchors do not map back to canonical facts and should be attached or removed.")
+
+
     return {
         "event_count": len(timeline_facts),
         "anchor_count": len(anchors),
@@ -1243,7 +1248,7 @@
         "missing_temporal_fact_ids": missing_temporal_fact_ids,
         "relative_only_fact_ids": relative_only_fact_ids,
         "warnings": warnings,
-        "partial_order_ready": bool(timeline_facts) and not missing_temporal_fact_ids and not temporal_conflict_relation_count,
+        "partial_order_ready": bool(timeline_facts) and not missing_temporal_fact_ids and not temporal_conflict_relation_count and not orphan_anchor_count,
         "day_precision_fact_count": len(day_precision_fact_ids),
         "non_day_precision_fact_ids": non_day_precision_fact_ids,
         "temporal_conflict_relation_count": temporal_conflict_relation_count,
